item.name: Con.Governance.DataSensitivityGuardPlugin

tags.processCatalogL3: 99.20.090 Configure and management office apps and add-ins

item.businessLogic: Pre-Operation validation preventing a con_datasensitivity downgrade (e.g. Regulated -> Public) on account/contact unless the executing user holds the CoE Data Protection Officer role; throws InvalidPluginExecutionException otherwise.
